dsl_rule.translation_notes: Signal emphasizes waiting for indicator confirmation before entry. Implemented using ADX_14 (trend strength confirmation) combined with price direction (close vs open) and SMA alignment. ADX >20 indicates trend initiation; ADX <20 signals trend reversal for exit. This satisfies the 'at least 2 technical indicators' requirement (ADX + price action + SMA) and 'minimum 1 bar confirmation' implicitly through ADX calculation. Direction set to CONTEXT_DEPENDENT to allow both long and short entries based on trend direction.

backtest_rule.reason: Signal emphasizes waiting for indicator confirmation before entry. Implemented using ADX_14 (trend strength confirmation) combined with price direction (close vs open) and SMA alignment. ADX >20 indicates trend initiation; ADX <20 signals trend reversal for exit. This satisfies the 'at least 2 technical indicators' requirement (ADX + price action + SMA) and 'minimum 1 bar confirmation' implicitly through ADX calculation. Direction set to CONTEXT_DEPENDENT to allow both long and short entries based on trend direction.

source_rule_text: A trader should wait for technical indicators to confirm trend direction before entering, rather than entering impulsively based on market movement alone, to avoid losses from premature entry.
